steps.name: Skip button removes item from home view
steps.criteria: Tapping skip on Shampoo hides it from Bathroom area. Area count updates to show 1 item.
steps.scenario_name: removes skipped item from the home view area

steps.name: Skipped item hidden in store view
steps.criteria: After skipping Shampoo on home screen, switching to store view does not show Shampoo
steps.scenario_name: skipped item does not appear in store view

steps.name: Re-add skipped staple
steps.criteria: Tapping re-add on skipped Butter makes it reappear in Fridge area
steps.scenario_name: re-adds a skipped staple on the home screen

steps.name: Area completion badge and progress
steps.criteria: Marking Bathroom done shows badge and '1 of 5 areas complete' text
steps.scenario_name: shows completion badge and progress bar after marking area done

steps.name: Navigate areas out of order
steps.criteria: Tapping Freezer opens it as active area without changing progress
steps.scenario_name: navigates to a different area out of order

steps.name: Whiteboard prompt on all areas complete
steps.criteria: After completing all 5 areas, 'Add from whiteboard' text is visible
steps.scenario_name: shows whiteboard prompt when all areas complete

steps.name: Show matching suggestions on typing
steps.criteria: Typing 'who' shows 'Whole milk - Dairy / Aisle 3' suggestion
steps.scenario_name: shows matching suggestions when typing a prefix

steps.name: Tap suggestion adds with metadata
steps.criteria: Tapping 'Whole milk' suggestion adds it to trip
steps.scenario_name: tapping a suggestion adds it with metadata

steps.name: No suggestions for unknown items
steps.scenario_name: shows no suggestions for unknown items

steps.name: Clear suggestions on empty input
steps.scenario_name: clears suggestions when quick-add field is cleared

steps.name: Checked count per section
steps.criteria: After checking Whole milk, Aisle 3: Dairy shows '1 of 3' progress
steps.scenario_name: shows checked count per store section

steps.name: Completion checkmark on full section
steps.criteria: After checking all items in Canned Goods, section shows completion checkmark
steps.scenario_name: shows completion checkmark on fully checked section

steps.name: Finish Trip on all sections complete
steps.criteria: After checking all items in all sections, Finish Trip button is visible
steps.scenario_name: reveals finish trip button when all sections are complete

steps.name: Summary with purchased count and breakdown
steps.criteria: After finishing trip, shows '5 items purchased' and staple counts
steps.scenario_name: displays total purchased and item breakdown

steps.name: Prep time on summary
steps.criteria: Summary shows approximately 3 minutes prep time

steps.name: Store view transition from summary
steps.criteria: Tapping 'Switch to Store View' from summary opens store view
steps.scenario_name: switches to store view from trip summary
